House moves in Foleshill come in all shapes — from compact a mix of terraced and semi-detached homes to larger family homes — and each one has its own logistical story. Our team plans every Foleshill move individually so nothing is left to chance.

Moving Profile for Foleshill

Foleshill's residential character is shaped by its a varied mix of terraced, semi-detached, and modern homes. This affects everything from the width of staircases to the loading access at the front of the property. Our team comes prepared with the right equipment for the property type and discusses access specifics during your pre-move call.

Access & Parking in Foleshill

The the main road through the area junction can stack up during peak traffic. Our routing plan uses quieter cut-throughs to keep your van moving and your move on time.

Services in Foleshill

All of our professional removal services are available in Foleshill and surrounding areas.

Why Choose The Royals Removals in Foleshill?

We treat your belongings the same way we'd treat our own. Furniture is wrapped before it leaves the property, not after it gets to the van. We use double-layer protection on glass-topped furniture and mirrors, carry specialist covers for mattresses, and lay floor runners before we even think about moving the first item. Our goal is a zero-damage move, and that starts with preparation, not luck.

Nearby Areas

We also cover these areas near Foleshill.

Foleshill Removal FAQs

How far in advance should I book removals in Foleshill? +
We recommend booking as soon as your completion date is confirmed — typically 2–4 weeks ahead for standard moves. However, we do take short-notice bookings when availability allows, so even if your date is close, it's worth calling.
Are your removal teams based locally? +
Yes — we operate from Birmingham and our crews are familiar with Foleshill and the surrounding neighbourhoods. That means less time figuring out the route and more time focused on your move.
What areas do you cover near Foleshill? +
We regularly cover Coventry, the surrounding area in addition to Foleshill itself. If you're moving between any of these neighbourhoods, we're well placed to help.
How much do house removals in Foleshill typically cost? +
Pricing depends on property size, distance, and any extra services. A local move within Foleshill for a 2–3 bedroom home typically takes 3–5 hours. We'll give you a fixed, itemised quote after a quick consultation — no guessing.

Every removal we carry out in Foleshill is backed by full Goods in Transit and Public Liability insurance for complete peace of mind. See our full insurance cover →
